Career Days

Kadir Has University Faculty of Law organizes Law Faculty Career Days every year with the contributions of various offices, institutions and organizations in order to enable students to have a good legal formation and to make the career plans they wish in their professional lives. In this way, students not only gain important information about the practice of law, but also have the chance to shape their careers by meeting law offices, non-governmental organizations, public institutions and companies operating in various fields of law during their undergraduate education.

As Kadir Has University Faculty of Law, we believe that it is just as important for our students to learn about participating law offices and their activities and to have the opportunity to intern at these offices, as well as to get to know the institutions or organizations where they can work as lawyers and the areas where well-trained lawyers are badly needed. In addition to being a good lawyer, raising students who are sensitive to human rights, trade union activities, protection of the environment, fight against gender-based discrimination, etc. constitutes an important part of our mission.
